systems.system_notes: Revision total knee arthroplasty platform with modular stems, augments, and interchangeable femoral-tibial revision components.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe a simplified instrumentation platform with trial-first revision workflow.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe independent femoral sizing within the revision system.
Official materials describe a symmetrical tibial tray design available in multiple sizes.
Official materials describe the 360 PS constrained bearing within the revision platform.
Official materials describe smooth, grit-blasted, and splined stem extensions in multiple lengths.
Official materials describe a universal femoral/tibial offset adapter rotating 360 degrees.
Official materials describe independent distal and posterior augments in multiple thicknesses.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The official product page defines the revision construct but this pass does not expand the full implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
